issue.message: WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE no longer provides write access when targeting Android 10, unless you use `requestLegacyExternalStorage`

Assigning `Locale.getDefault()` to a final static field is suspicious; this code will not work correctly if the user changes locale while the app is running
issue.errorLine1: private val DATE_TIME_FORMAT = SimpleDateFormat("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm", Locale.getDefault())
